mapper.select: SELECT corp_id AS corpId, corp_name AS corpName, business_registration_number AS businessRegistrationNumber, chief_name AS chiefName, CASE WHEN chief_image_path = 'single-image' THEN 'single-image' WHEN chief_image_path = 'split-editor-image' THEN 'split-editor-image' ELSE 'split-editor-image' END AS displayMode, phone_number AS phoneNumber, postal_code AS postalCode, address_line1 AS addressLine1, address_line2 AS addressLine2, introduction, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM com_corp WHERE is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY updated_at DESC, corp_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com_corp ( corp_name, business_registration_number, chief_name, chief_image_path, phone_number, postal_code, address_line1, address_line2, introduction, created_by, created_ip, updated_by, updated_ip, updated_at, is_active, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{corpName}, #{businessRegistrationNumber}, #{chiefName}, COALESCE(#{displayMode}, 'split-editor-image'), #{phoneNumber}, #{postalCode}, #{addressLine1}, #{addressLine2}, #{introduction}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{createdBy}, ''), 'system'), CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(#{createdIp}, ''), '127.0.0.1') AS inet), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{updatedBy}, ''), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{createdBy}, ''), 'system')), CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(#{updatedIp}, ''), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{createdIp}, ''), '127.0.0.1')) AS inet), NOW(), TRUE, FALSE )
mapper.update: UPDATE com_corp SET corp_name = COALESCE(#{request.corpName}, corp_name), business_registration_number = COALESCE(#{request.businessRegistrationNumber}, business_registration_number), chief_name = COALESCE(#{request.chiefName}, chief_name), chief_image_path = COALESCE(#{request.displayMode}, chief_image_path), phone_number = #{request.phoneNumber}, postal_code = #{request.postalCode}, address_line1 = #{request.addressLine1}, address_line2 = #{request.addressLine2}, introduction = #{request.introduction}, updated_by = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{request.updatedBy}, ''), 'system'), updated_ip = CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(#{request.updatedIp}, ''), '127.0.0.1') AS inet), updated_at = NOW() WHERE corp_id = #{corpId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE com_corp SET is_deleted = TRUE, is_active = FALSE, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_ip = CAST(#{updatedIp} AS inet), updated_at = NOW() WHERE corp_id = #{corpId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
